name: BitFlags

values.name: allFlags
values.comment: List all created flags on bit flag settings

values.name: createFlag
values.comment: Create a flag from the bit flag settings

values.name: deleteFlag
values.comment: Delete a flag from the bit flag settings.

values.name: disableFlag
values.comment: Disable a flag on a register.

values.name: enableFlag
values.comment: Enable a flag on a register.

values.name: enabledFlags
values.comment: List all enabled flags on a register.

values.name: flipFlag
values.comment: Flip flag value on a register.

values.name: genRegister
values.comment: Generate a register based on a set of flags

values.name: genSet
values.comment: Generate a flag set based on register

values.name: initSettings
values.type: { bitLimit : Basics.Int, flags : List.List String.String } -> Result.Result String.String BitFlags.BitFlagSettings

values.name: match
values.comment: With a whitelist and blacklist of flags, determine if the register is a match
values.type: BitFlags.BitFlagSettings -> List.List String.String -> List.List String.String -> Basics.Int -> Basics.Bool

values.name: updateFlag
values.comment: Update a flag on the bit flag settings.
